# climpred

> climpred is a Python package for verification of weather and climate forecasts and
> predictions. It is built on xarray, dask and xskillscore and analyzes output from
> initialized dynamical forecast models, ranging from short-term weather forecasts to
> decadal climate forecasts.

The two main user-facing classes are `HindcastEnsemble` (verify an initialized ensemble
against observations/reanalysis) and `PerfectModelEnsemble` (verify ensemble members
against each other in a perfect-model framework). Both subclass `PredictionEnsemble`.
climpred tracks the core prediction dimensions `init` (initialization), `lead` (lead
time) and `member`, and computes deterministic and probabilistic skill `metrics` using
different `comparisons`, `alignment` strategies, significance tests and bias removal.

Install with `pip install climpred[complete]` or `conda install -c conda-forge climpred`.
Python ≥3.9 is required. Source lives under `src/climpred/` (src-layout); the main
classes are in `src/climpred/classes.py` and options in `src/climpred/options.py`.

## Getting started

- [Why climpred](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/why-climpred.html): motivation and design goals.
- [Scope](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/scope.html): what climpred does and does not do.
- [Quick start](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/quick-start.html): minimal end-to-end verification example.
- [Examples](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/examples.html): notebook gallery of real-world use cases.

## User guide

- [Setting up data](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/setting-up-data.html): required dimensions (`init`, `lead`, `member`) and metadata conventions.
- [Initialized datasets](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/initialized-datasets.html): bundled tutorial datasets via `climpred.tutorial.load_dataset`.
- [PredictionEnsemble object](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/prediction-ensemble-object.html): building and manipulating `HindcastEnsemble` / `PerfectModelEnsemble`.
- [Alignment](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/alignment.html): how forecasts and verification are matched in time (`same_inits`, `same_verif`, `maximize`).
- [Metrics](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/metrics.html): deterministic and probabilistic skill metrics.
- [Comparisons](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/comparisons.html): how forecasts are compared to verification (`e2o`, `m2o`, `m2m`, ...).
- [Significance](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/significance.html): bootstrapping and significance testing of skill.
- [Bias removal](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/bias_removal.html): `remove_bias` methods for systematic forecast bias.
- [Smoothing](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/smoothing.html): temporal and spatial smoothing of ensembles.
- [Terminology](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/terminology.html): definitions of hindcast, lead, init, verification, etc.
- [Reference forecasts](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/reference_forecast.html): persistence, climatology and uninitialized baselines.

## API reference

- [API reference](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api.html): auto-generated summary of all public classes, methods and functions.

## For AI coding agents

- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/pangeo-data/climpred/blob/main/AGENTS.md): development commands, code style, conventions and contribution workflow.
- [climpred forecast-verification skill](https://github.com/pangeo-data/climpred/blob/main/.agents/skills/climpred-forecast-verification/SKILL.md): task-oriented skill with core concepts, classes, methods and workflows.
- [Skill reference: metrics](https://github.com/pangeo-data/climpred/blob/main/.agents/skills/climpred-forecast-verification/reference/metrics.md)
- [Skill reference: comparisons](https://github.com/pangeo-data/climpred/blob/main/.agents/skills/climpred-forecast-verification/reference/comparisons.md)
- [Skill reference: bias removal](https://github.com/pangeo-data/climpred/blob/main/.agents/skills/climpred-forecast-verification/reference/bias_removal.md)
- [Skill reference: setting up data](https://github.com/pangeo-data/climpred/blob/main/.agents/skills/climpred-forecast-verification/reference/setting_up_data.md)

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/changelog.html): release notes and version history.
- [Contributing](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/contributing.html): how to contribute to climpred.
- [Related packages](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/related-packages.html): the surrounding xarray/pangeo verification ecosystem.
- [Publications](https://climpred.readthedocs.io/en/stable/publications.html): papers using climpred.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/pangeo-data/climpred): source code and issue tracker.
